contents.payloadHashMethod: sha256(sorted path\0sha256(content)\n excluding version.json and artifact.json)

notes: Full cumulative source-handoff overlay for the cooking-kettles cluster and all prior site content.
Contains 39 indexable cooking-kettle pages, unified navigation, forms, analytics, search and media.
Preserves the final root runtime-data contract for the parokonvektomat error search.
Unchanged binary font files are intentionally not repackaged; canonical Git checkout retains them because overlay is without --delete.
Deploy only through canonical mosrollout flow; do not rsync --delete.
Canonical .github/workflows/deploy.yml must be preserved by rollout kit.
description: Полный cumulative source-handoff сайта MosPochin с инженерным кластером пищеварочных котлов, поиском кодов, навигацией, конверсией, аналитикой и медиасистемой.
